headline: FS KKR Capital: There's Light At The End Of The Rotation With A Potential 40%+ Upside
summary: FS KKR Capital trades at 0.59x NAV after a sharp drop; see catalysts (KKR tender, buyback, fee waiver) and modeled returns with credit stress. See more on FSK here.
